Modals, Drawers, Sheets

Confirmation dialogs, feature modals, side drawers, bottom sheets.

Destructive confirmation

Delete project

Are you sure you want to delete this project? All data will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

Feature announcement

Introducing AI assist

Draft faster with AI suggestions built in. Now available on all paid plans.
